extortion.description: [AI generated] Mavis Tire Supply LLC, often known as Mavis Discount Tire, is one of the largest independent multi-brand tire dealers in the U.S. Founded in 1972, it offers a vast variety of tires, wheels and auto parts while also providing vehicle maintenance services such as brakes, oil changes and alignment. The company has over 700 service centers across 13 states, primarily in the Northeast and South of the United States.
